exercises.title: Inspect CPU Topology
exercises.description: Run lscpu and identify cores, threads per core, cache sizes, and architecture flags.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain the CPU topology and read the cache hierarchy from the output.

exercises.title: Measure a Hot Loop
exercises.description: Run a CPU-bound loop under time and compare the runtime with a no-op script.
exercises.command:
time python - <<'PY'
for _ in range(50_000_000):
    pass
PY
exercises.expected_outcome: The loop takes measurable CPU time and is clearly slower than a no-op command.

exercises.title: False Sharing Benchmark
exercises.description: Write a small C or Rust benchmark that updates adjacent counters with and without padding.
exercises.expected_outcome: The padded version runs faster and shows fewer cache-coherence stalls.

exercises.title: Profile a Branchy Loop
exercises.description: Create a branch-heavy microbenchmark and inspect branch misses with perf stat.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can observe that unpredictable branches increase branch-miss rate.

exercises.title: Scalar vs SIMD Sum
exercises.description: Implement a vectorized sum and compare it against a scalar version on a large array.
exercises.expected_outcome: The SIMD version should outperform the scalar version on large inputs.

exercises.title: Blocked Matrix Multiply
exercises.description: Implement naive and cache-blocked matrix multiplication and compare runtimes.
exercises.expected_outcome: The blocked implementation should improve cache reuse and run faster than the naive one.
